title: Under Water
author: J.C. Greenburg
desc: Andrew, Judy & Thudd accidentally launch Uncle Al's Water Bug submarine and dive into the deep ocean to stop Soggy Bob from turning giant squids into snacks! 🌊

q.en: Before Uncle Al turned it into an underwater vehicle, what was the Water Bug?
q.zh: 在阿尔叔叔把它改造成潜水器之前，水虫号（Water Bug）原本是什么？

options.en: An old Volkswagen Beetle car
options.zh: 一辆老旧的大众甲壳虫汽车

options.en: A real giant water-bug insect
options.zh: 一只真正的水生大臭虫

options.en: A fishing boat
A helicopter

explain.en: Andrew shows Judy the Water Bug: a Volkswagen Beetle parked on a ramp above the water that Uncle Al converted into a submarine, with paddle wheels instead of tires and a glass floor.
explain.zh: 安德鲁给朱迪看的水虫号是一辆停在斜坡上的大众甲壳虫汽车，被阿尔叔叔改装成潜水器，用桨轮代替轮胎，还装了玻璃地板。

q.en: How does the Water Bug end up steering itself to the deepest ocean?
q.zh: 水虫号怎么会自己驶向最深的海底？

options.en: Andrew broke the destination dial off the dashboard, leaving it stuck on autopilot
options.zh: 安德鲁把目的地旋钮从仪表盘上弄断了，使它卡在自动驾驶上

options.en: Judy pressed the wrong button on purpose
Uncle Al remote-controlled it there
options.zh: 阿尔叔叔远程操控它去的

options.en: A shark pulled it down
options.zh: 一只鲨鱼把它拽下去的

explain.en: Andrew tried to turn the biggest black dial and it fell off (KRACK!). Judy points out he broke it off, so the Water Bug got stuck on autopilot heading to the deepest ocean to search for giant squids.
explain.zh: 安德鲁拧最大的黑色旋钮时它掉了下来（KRACK!），朱迪说他是把旋钮弄断了，于是水虫号卡在自动驾驶，驶向最深的海底去寻找大王乌贼。

q.en: What is Soggy Bob Sloggins building, and why does it worry Uncle Al?
q.zh: 撒吉·鲍勃·斯洛金斯（Soggy Bob Sloggins）在建造什么，为什么让阿尔叔叔担心？

options.en: Animal Universe, the biggest theme park ever — he steals animals and doesn't care about them
options.zh: “动物宇宙”——史上最大的主题公园；他偷动物而且根本不关心它们

options.en: A giant aquarium to protect giant squids
options.zh: 一个保护大王乌贼的巨大水族馆

options.en: A new submarine factory
A hotel in Hawaii

explain.en: Uncle Al says Soggy Bob steals animals worldwide to build Animal Universe, the biggest theme park ever. He doesn't care about the animals and would 'stuff' them if too costly — and he wants to catch giant squids for 'Squidwiches.'
explain.zh: 阿尔叔叔说撒吉·鲍勃偷遍全世界的动物来建造“动物宇宙”这座最大的主题公园。他不关心动物，养不起就把它们做成标本，还想抓大王乌贼做“乌贼三明治”。

q.en: When a hammerhead shark attacks the Water Bug, what is strange about its head?
q.zh: 锤头鲨攻击水虫号时，它的头有什么奇特之处？

options.en: It is as wide as the windshield and shaped like the top of the letter T, with an eye at each end
options.zh: 和挡风玻璃一样宽，形状像字母 T 的顶部，两端各有一只眼睛

options.en: It is round like a ball
It has no eyes at all
It is covered in brightly colored feathers

explain.en: Judy sees the shark's head is as wide as the windshield and shaped like the top of a T, with a big dark eye at each end of the T — Thudd identifies it as a hammerhead shark.
explain.zh: 朱迪看到鲨鱼头和挡风玻璃一样宽、形状像字母 T 的顶部，T 的两端各有一只大黑眼睛——撒德认出这是锤头鲨。

q.en: After the destination dial breaks off, how does Judy restore steering control?
q.zh: 目的地旋钮掉落后，朱迪是怎么恢复转向控制的？

options.en: She uses a hairpin from her hair to reconnect the dial to the dashboard
options.zh: 她用头发上的发卡把旋钮重新连到仪表盘上

options.en: She calls Uncle Al on the phone
She kicks the dashboard
She asks the shark for help

explain.en: Judy pulls a hairpin from her frizzy hair, straightens it, pokes one end through the bottom of the dial and the other into the hole in the dashboard, gives it a twist — and the steering wheel works again.
explain.zh: 朱迪从卷发里取出发卡弄直，一端穿过旋钮底部、另一端插进仪表盘上的孔再一拧——转向盘就又能用了。

q.en: What does the Bug-a-Boo do when Andrew presses its red button?
q.zh: 安德鲁按下红色按钮时，布加布（Bug-a-Boo）有什么作用？

options.en: It pops out and makes the Water Bug look big and scary to frighten the shark away
options.zh: 它会弹出来，让水虫号看起来又大又可怕，把鲨鱼吓走

options.en: It squirts water to fill the tires
It cooks dinner in the kitchen
It plays music

explain.en: Thudd tells Andrew to press the red Bug-a-Boo button. A clown-collar-like thing with red-and-orange stripes and black spots pops out and makes the Water Bug look big and scary, so the shark shakes its head and leaves.
explain.zh: 撒德让安德鲁按红色的布加布按钮，一个像小丑领圈、带红橙条纹和黑点的东西弹出来，让水虫号显得又大又吓人，鲨鱼于是摇头游走了。

q.en: Thudd says the open-ocean water looks green because of what floating in it?
q.zh: 撒德说外海的海水呈绿色，是因为里面漂浮着什么？

options.en: Lots of tiny green plants and animals called plankton
options.zh: 大量叫浮游生物（plankton）的微小绿色植物和动物

options.en: Green paint spilled from a ship
options.zh: 从船上洒出的绿色颜料

options.en: Sunlight shining through green glass
options.zh: 透过绿色玻璃照射的阳光

options.en: A single giant green fish

explain.en: Thudd explains the water is green because lots of tiny green plants (and tiny animals) float there — called plankton — and green water means lots of food for fish.
explain.zh: 撒德解释说海水呈绿色是因为那里漂浮着大量微小的绿色植物（和微小动物），叫浮游生物；绿色海水意味着鱼有很多食物。

q.en: The book says dolphins breathe voluntarily and can never be fully asleep. How do they keep breathing?
q.zh: 书里说海豚是“自主呼吸”、永远无法完全睡着。它们怎么做到一直呼吸？

options.en: Half of a dolphin's brain sleeps while the other half stays awake
options.zh: 海豚一半大脑睡觉，另一半保持清醒

options.en: They hold their breath all night
They sleep on the surface with their mouths open
options.zh: 它们张着嘴浮在水面睡觉

options.en: They do not need to breathe at all

explain.en: True Stuff says humans breathe automatically, but dolphins breathe voluntarily and must choose to breathe. To keep breathing, half of a dolphin's brain sleeps while the other half stays awake.
explain.zh: “真相小课堂”说人类会自动呼吸，而海豚必须自主呼吸、主动选择呼吸。为了持续呼吸，海豚一半大脑睡觉、另一半保持清醒。

q.en: Flame scallops flash light inside their shells. Thudd calls this 'bioluminescence.' What does it mean?
q.zh: 火焰扇贝在壳内闪着光。撒德称之为“生物发光”（bioluminescence）。这是什么意思？

options.en: Light made by a living thing
Light from the sun reflected in water
Light from Uncle Al's flashlight
Lightning in a storm

explain.en: Thudd explains many sea creatures make their own light, and 'bioluminescence' means 'light made by a living thing' — like the flame scallops glowing inside their shells.
explain.zh: 撒德解释说许多海洋生物会自己制造光，“生物发光”意思就是“由生物制造的光”，比如火焰扇贝在壳里发光。

q.en: According to True Stuff, if all the salt in the oceans were piled on land, how deep would it bury the earth?
q.zh: 根据“真相小课堂”，如果把海洋里所有的盐堆在陆地上，会覆盖地球多深？

options.en: About 500 feet, as tall as a fifty-story office building
options.zh: 约 500 英尺，相当于一栋 50 层的办公大楼

options.en: About one inch
About a mile
It would not pile up at all

explain.en: True Stuff says the salt would bury every inch of the earth under 500 feet of salt — about as tall as a fifty-story office building. Rivers constantly wash salt out of the soil into the oceans.
explain.zh: “真相小课堂”说这些盐会把地球每寸地表埋在 500 英尺下，约 50 层楼那么高；河流不断把土壤里的盐冲进海洋。
